author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Implemented unsafe/lossy casting (issue #361). Changes:

1. New module ferray-core/src/dtype/unsafe_cast.rs with the CastTo<U> trait â€” a superset of PromoteTo that covers every Element pair: 15 identity casts, 132 numeric primitive cross-casts via 'as', boolâ†”int/float/Complex, numericâ†’bool (nonzero check), realâ†’Complex, Complexâ†’real (take .re), and Complex<f32>â†”Complex<f64>. Conversion semantics match Rust's 'as' operator and NumPy's casting='unsafe'. f16/bf16 not yet wired.

2. New Array::cast<U>(casting: CastKind) method in dtype/casting.rs that uses CastTo to perform the conversion after validating with can_cast() at the chosen safety level. This is the general-purpose method matching NumPy's arr.astype(dtype, casting=...). The pre-existing AsType::astype<U>() (PromoteTo-bound) remains as the safe-only fast path.

3. New DynArray::astype(target: DType, casting: CastKind) for runtime-typed conversion. Uses an inner cast_into! macro to dispatch on the source variant, then an outer match on the target dtype to wrap the result. Handles all 15Â˛ = 225 element pairs (excluding f16/bf16 which return InvalidDtype).

4. Tests:
- 14 unsafe_cast tests covering int widening/narrowing, floatâ†’int truncation, boolâ†”numeric, realâ†”Complex, NaN, identity
- 9 Array::cast tests covering Unsafe/Safe/SameKind/No, narrowing errors, complexâ†’real, realâ†’complex, intâ†’bool
- 6 DynArray::astype tests covering all four CastKind levels, complexâ†’real, boolâ†’u8

Result: 476 ferray-core tests pass (was 447), full workspace tests + clippy clean. Closing as completed.
